style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Squirtle's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished steel plating; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into metallic dust particles drifting in slow motion. Its aura shimmers with a cool, intense azure glow, casting sharp geometric shadows that emphasize its angular form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
